title: trifolium subterraneum var. typicum
intro: Trifolium subterraneum var. typicum, commonly known as subterranean clover, is a perennial legume native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of subterranean clover include its potential to reduce blood pressure, improve digestion, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of subterranean clover include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and other health issues.
